records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So, you wish to host a Christmas party?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So, you wish to host a Christmas party?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So, you wish to host a Christmas party?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Sister Luce.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Sister Luce.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Sister Luce.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We couldn't celebrate it last year due to the sacred mission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We couldn't celebrate it last year due to the sacred mission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We couldn't celebrate it last year due to the sacred mission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this year, I was thinking of inviting everyone we're thankful for and spending Christmas altogether.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this year, I was thinking of inviting everyone we're thankful for and spending Christmas altogether.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this year, I was thinking of inviting everyone we're thankful for and spending Christmas altogether.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, it just so happens that Christmas is when Sister Looper returns from her priest evaluation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, it just so happens that Christmas is when Sister Looper returns from her priest evaluation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, it just so happens that Christmas is when Sister Looper returns from her priest evaluation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...How coincidental.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...How coincidental.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...How coincidental.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I-is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I-is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I-is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-right! So, how about we celebrate Sister Looper's ordination on Christmas too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-right! So, how about we celebrate Sister Looper's ordination on Christmas too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-right! So, how about we celebrate Sister Looper's ordination on Christmas too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that seems a bit strange.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that seems a bit strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that seems a bit strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no guarantee that Sister Looper will pass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no guarantee that Sister Looper will pass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no guarantee that Sister Looper will pass.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
U-um... B-but still
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
U-um... B-but still
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
U-um... B-but still
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I guess there's no fooling Sister Luce.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I guess there's no fooling Sister Luce.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I guess there's no fooling Sister Luce.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In truth, I wanted to create a special memory for Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In truth, I wanted to create a special memory for Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In truth, I wanted to create a special memory for Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A special memory?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A special memory?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A special memory?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Because she has never properly celebrated Christmas before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Because she has never properly celebrated Christmas before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Because she has never properly celebrated Christmas before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...When I arrived at the CSE Level 3 Corrupted Area for my sacred mission, she was all alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...When I arrived at the CSE Level 3 Corrupted Area for my sacred mission, she was all alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...When I arrived at the CSE Level 3 Corrupted Area for my sacred mission, she was all alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I saw her watching a horror movie by herself in the cultist's basement as if she was possessed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I saw her watching a horror movie by herself in the cultist's basement as if she was possessed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I saw her watching a horror movie by herself in the cultist's basement as if she was possessed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She was covered in blood, surrounded by scattered C.O. corpses...
records.m_Talk_DEU: She was covered in blood, surrounded by scattered C.O. corpses...
records.m_Talk_FRA: She was covered in blood, surrounded by scattered C.O. corpses...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The cult that imprisoned her committed human rights violations under the guise of an orphanage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The cult that imprisoned her committed human rights violations under the guise of an orphanage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The cult that imprisoned her committed human rights violations under the guise of an orphanage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sacred mission report stated that she had delirium due to CSE, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sacred mission report stated that she had delirium due to CSE, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sacred mission report stated that she had delirium due to CSE, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: When Sister Looper had her mental health examined after being rescued, the results showed no abnormalities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When Sister Looper had her mental health examined after being rescued, the results showed no abnormalities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When Sister Looper had her mental health examined after being rescued, the results showed no abnormalities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, the human rights violations committed by the cult cannot necessarily be blamed on CSE.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, the human rights violations committed by the cult cannot necessarily be blamed on CSE.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, the human rights violations committed by the cult cannot necessarily be blamed on CSE.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rather, there is research that shows that the subconscious emotional change in humans can affect the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rather, there is research that shows that the subconscious emotional change in humans can affect the Counterside Effect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rather, there is research that shows that the subconscious emotional change in humans can affect the Counterside Effect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. But then, that means...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. But then, that means...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. But then, that means...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper has spent years there without going insane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper has spent years there without going insane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper has spent years there without going insane.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how tough she acts, she is still just a child... That poor thing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how tough she acts, she is still just a child... That poor thing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how tough she acts, she is still just a child... That poor thing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say people live by memories, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say people live by memories, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say people live by memories, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... would it be possible for you to generously forgive Sister Looper?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... would it be possible for you to generously forgive Sister Looper?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... would it be possible for you to generously forgive Sister Looper?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This year, I want to give her a <color=#ffd34c>special Christmas</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This year, I want to give her a <color=#ffd34c>special Christmas</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This year, I want to give her a <color=#ffd34c>special Christmas</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A happy memory that she will cherish well into her adulthood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A happy memory that she will cherish well into her adulthood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A happy memory that she will cherish well into her adulthood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson. Personal and professional matters must be kept strictly separate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson. Personal and professional matters must be kept strictly separate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson. Personal and professional matters must be kept strictly separate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do not let my emotions get involved in the responsibilities our Lord has given me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do not let my emotions get involved in the responsibilities our Lord has given me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do not let my emotions get involved in the responsibilities our Lord has given me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What you're saying is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What you're saying is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What you're saying is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the Lord has also said that happiness is multiplied when shared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the Lord has also said that happiness is multiplied when shared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the Lord has also said that happiness is multiplied when shared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, a small banquet with everyone we owe a debt of gratitude does not sound like a bad idea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, a small banquet with everyone we owe a debt of gratitude does not sound like a bad idea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, a small banquet with everyone we owe a debt of gratitude does not sound like a bad idea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is important to maintain proper respect in professional relations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is important to maintain proper respect in professional relations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is important to maintain proper respect in professional relations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Luce...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Luce...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Luce...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, do not tell Sister Looper about this until Christmas Day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, do not tell Sister Looper about this until Christmas Day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, do not tell Sister Looper about this until Christmas Day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her priest evaluation is in a few days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her priest evaluation is in a few days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her priest evaluation is in a few days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She has just started to put in effort, and I worry that she will get too excited and neglect her duties.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She has just started to put in effort, and I worry that she will get too excited and neglect her duties.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She has just started to put in effort, and I worry that she will get too excited and neglect her duties.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-of course! I'll keep it a secret from Sister Looper!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-of course! I'll keep it a secret from Sister Looper!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-of course! I'll keep it a secret from Sister Looper!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah, it seems that this will be a surprise party for Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah, it seems that this will be a surprise party for Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah, it seems that this will be a surprise party for Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Thank you for understanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Thank you for understanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Thank you for understanding.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To be honest, I didn't expect you to allow it this easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To be honest, I didn't expect you to allow it this easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To be honest, I didn't expect you to allow it this easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you didn't like Sister Looper...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you didn't like Sister Looper...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you didn't like Sister Looper...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ahem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ahem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ahem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do not. Sister Looper is irrational, violent, and ignorant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do not. Sister Looper is irrational, violent, and ignorant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do not. Sister Looper is irrational, violent, and ignorant.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I can hope for as her senior is that she matures quickly with each passing day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I can hope for as her senior is that she matures quickly with each passing day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I can hope for as her senior is that she matures quickly with each passing day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, leave everything to me... from choosing the party location, inviting our guests, and preparing the food.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, leave everything to me... from choosing the party location, inviting our guests, and preparing the food.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, leave everything to me... from choosing the party location, inviting our guests, and preparing the food.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do my best so everyone can have a happy Christmas...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do my best so everyone can have a happy Christmas...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do my best so everyone can have a happy Christmas...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I look forward to the party, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I look forward to the party, Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I look forward to the party, Sister Nelson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on, preparing food...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on, preparing food...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on, preparing food...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you actually followed them. What did you see within the village?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you actually followed them. What did you see within the village?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you actually followed them. What did you see within the village?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There wasn't much, to be honest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There wasn't much, to be honest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There wasn't much, to be honest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some were singing and dancing. Others were drawing something in dirt. And one was preparing food in the corner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some were singing and dancing. Others were drawing something in dirt. And one was preparing food in the corner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some were singing and dancing. Others were drawing something in dirt. And one was preparing food in the corner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone would've guessed it was a festival from far away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone would've guessed it was a festival from far away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone would've guessed it was a festival from far away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But up close?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But up close?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But up close?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The soup these people were eating was full of those big wigglers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The soup these people were eating was full of those big wigglers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The soup these people were eating was full of those big wigglers.

<color=#ffd34c>I should've shown that to Claudia, then she

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nelson's resume included a lot of volunteer experience. Maybe it is one of those weird metaphors the kid uses.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Nelson's resume included a lot of volunteer experience. Maybe it is one of those weird metaphors the kid uses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I guess it is nothing to worry about. After all, food is about the effort that is put in rather than its taste.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I guess it is nothing to worry about. After all, food is about the effort that is put in rather than its taste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Doubt until thou cannot doubt any more</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Doubt until thou cannot doubt any more</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before long, this young librarian would come to realize
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before long, this young librarian would come to realize
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before long, this young librarian would come to realize

records.m_Talk_ENG: that the intuition that she had as an Inquisitorial Priest was not unfounded...
records.m_Talk_DEU: that the intuition that she had as an Inquisitorial Priest was not unfounded...
records.m_Talk_FRA: that the intuition that she had as an Inquisitorial Priest was not unfounded...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I apologize for keeping you waiting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I apologize for keeping you waiting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I apologize for keeping you waiting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has been a while, Sister Nelson. How have you been faring?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has been a while, Sister Nelson. How have you been faring?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has been a while, Sister Nelson. How have you been faring?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. How have you been, Mr. Ferrier?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. How have you been, Mr. Ferrier?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. How have you been, Mr. Ferrier?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you can just call me Ryan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you can just call me Ryan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you can just call me Ryan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what brings a Sister from the Investigation Council to the Institution...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what brings a Sister from the Investigation Council to the Institution...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what brings a Sister from the Investigation Council to the Institution...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, nothing much... I'm here to deliver this to the Chief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, nothing much... I'm here to deliver this to the Chief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, nothing much... I'm here to deliver this to the Chief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... an invitation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... an invitation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... an invitation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. This Christmas, the Investigation Council is holding a small Christmas party.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. This Christmas, the Investigation Council is holding a small Christmas party.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. This Christmas, the Investigation Council is holding a small Christmas party.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that Sir Burnett of the Institution and Cardinal Johan had long been close friends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that Sir Burnett of the Institution and Cardinal Johan had long been close friends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that Sir Burnett of the Institution and Cardinal Johan had long been close friends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I thought that if we were to host a Christmas party, this first thing I should do is make a visit to the Institution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I thought that if we were to host a Christmas party, this first thing I should do is make a visit to the Institution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I thought that if we were to host a Christmas party, this first thing I should do is make a visit to the Institution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, this is an honor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, this is an honor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, this is an honor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An invitation from Holy Curia. I am sure Lady Elizabeth will be thrilled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An invitation from Holy Curia. I am sure Lady Elizabeth will be thrilled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An invitation from Holy Curia. I am sure Lady Elizabeth will be thrilled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But um... where might Chief be...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But um... where might Chief be...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But um... where might Chief be...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Lady Elizabeth has run away from ho
8g Ahem! I mean, is out of the office for the time being.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Lady Elizabeth has run away from ho
8g Ahem! I mean, is out of the office for the time being.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Lady Elizabeth has run away from ho
8g Ahem! I mean, is out of the office for the time being.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not to worry. I will make sure she receives this invitation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not to worry. I will make sure she receives this invitation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not to worry. I will make sure she receives this invitation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. In that case, please give it to her, Ryan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. In that case, please give it to her, Ryan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. In that case, please give it to her, Ryan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Drats! Come to think of it, I forgot to bring out desserts that go with this tea for our guest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Drats! Come to think of it, I forgot to bring out desserts that go with this tea for our guest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Drats! Come to think of it, I forgot to bring out desserts that go with this tea for our guest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Desserts?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Desserts?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Desserts?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, a good relationship cannot be cherished without fragrant black tea and sweet desserts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, a good relationship cannot be cherished without fragrant black tea and sweet desserts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, a good relationship cannot be cherished without fragrant black tea and sweet desserts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you please wait a moment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you please wait a moment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you please wait a moment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, Ryan, shall swiftly make you something delicious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, Ryan, shall swiftly make you something delicious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, Ryan, shall swiftly make you something delicious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for waiting. Now, please don't hesitate to take a bite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for waiting. Now, please don't hesitate to take a bite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for waiting. Now, please don't hesitate to take a bite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are these biscuits? The butter in it smells so good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are these biscuits? The butter in it smells so good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are these biscuits? The butter in it smells so good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a scone, a popular English dessert. It goes best with tea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is a scone, a popular English dessert. It goes best with tea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is a scone, a popular English dessert. It goes best with tea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's so crispy! It really does go great with tea! And the fruit jam served with it is delightful!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's so crispy! It really does go great with tea! And the fruit jam served with it is delightful!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's so crispy! It really does go great with tea! And the fruit jam served with it is delightful!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have outdone yourself! I didn't know you could bake such delicious bread!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have outdone yourself! I didn't know you could bake such delicious bread!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have outdone yourself! I didn't know you could bake such delicious bread!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you have great insight. A well baked, then cooled scone is crispy and delicious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you have great insight. A well baked, then cooled scone is crispy and delicious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you have great insight. A well baked, then cooled scone is crispy and delicious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I prefer not to add eggs because it brings out the dry texture of the dough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I prefer not to add eggs because it brings out the dry texture of the dough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I prefer not to add eggs because it brings out the dry texture of the dough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ryan, how did you get your hands on such a recipe?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ryan, how did you get your hands on such a recipe?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ryan, how did you get your hands on such a recipe?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, Lady Elizabeth is a rather picky eater, so you can say these are the results of my constant efforts to satisfy her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, Lady Elizabeth is a rather picky eater, so you can say these are the results of my constant efforts to satisfy her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, Lady Elizabeth is a rather picky eater, so you can say these are the results of my constant efforts to satisfy her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have certifications for Western, Chinese, and Japanese cuisine, as well as master-level patisserie and chocolatier qualifications...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have certifications for Western, Chinese, and Japanese cuisine, as well as master-level patisserie and chocolatier qualifications...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have certifications for Western, Chinese, and Japanese cuisine, as well as master-level patisserie and chocolatier qualifications...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All to ensure that I can serve Lady Elizabeth the finest dishes anytime, anywhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All to ensure that I can serve Lady Elizabeth the finest dishes anytime, anywhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All to ensure that I can serve Lady Elizabeth the finest dishes anytime, anywhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I admire your passion. You see, I also like to cook.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I admire your passion. You see, I also like to cook.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I admire your passion. You see, I also like to cook.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although I'm not as great as you, Ryan...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although I'm not as great as you, Ryan...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although I'm not as great as you, Ryan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you flatter me. Now, I'm curious to taste your cooking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you flatter me. Now, I'm curious to taste your cooking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you flatter me. Now, I'm curious to taste your cooking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, since you mentioned it, Ryan...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, since you mentioned it, Ryan...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, since you mentioned it, Ryan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's rude to suddenly ask for a favor, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's rude to suddenly ask for a favor, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's rude to suddenly ask for a favor, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have been pondering what dishes I should serve at the Christmas party.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have been pondering what dishes I should serve at the Christmas party.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have been pondering what dishes I should serve at the Christmas party.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know any dishes that are suitable for one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know any dishes that are suitable for one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know any dishes that are suitable for one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... A Christmas party, you say...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... A Christmas party, you say...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... A Christmas party, you say...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe a sweet dessert will be a good choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe a sweet dessert will be a good choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe a sweet dessert will be a good choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dessert...? Well, this is embarrassing to admit, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A dessert...? Well, this is embarrassing to admit, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A dessert...? Well, this is embarrassing to admit, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never made desserts before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never made desserts before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never made desserts before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it is okay with you, Sister, would you like to learn a recipe from me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it is okay with you, Sister, would you like to learn a recipe from me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it is okay with you, Sister, would you like to learn a recipe from me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? A recipe?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? A recipe?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? A recipe?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. There is a treasured recipe that has been passed down to the Ferrier family for generations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. There is a treasured recipe that has been passed down to the Ferrier family for generations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. There is a treasured recipe that has been passed down to the Ferrier family for generations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, it will still be delicious regardless if it snows or not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, it will still be delicious regardless if it snows or not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, it will still be delicious regardless if it snows or not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this is it...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this is it...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this is it...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was looking for a dish that became even more delicious when shared with others!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was looking for a dish that became even more delicious when shared with others!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was looking for a dish that became even more delicious when shared with others!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, maybe it was the Lord's will that I came here and met you, Ryan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, maybe it was the Lord's will that I came here and met you, Ryan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, maybe it was the Lord's will that I came here and met you, Ryan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I am glad that I was of help to you, Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I am glad that I was of help to you, Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I am glad that I was of help to you, Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... what kind of dessert is it that suits a white Christmas?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... what kind of dessert is it that suits a white Christmas?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... what kind of dessert is it that suits a white Christmas?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's called...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's called...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's called...

records.m_Talk_ENG: a <color=#ffd34c>chocolate mousse cake</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: a <color=#ffd34c>chocolate mousse cake</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: a <color=#ffd34c>chocolate mousse cake</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So, you wish to host a Christmas party?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So, you wish to host a Christmas party?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So, you wish to host a Christmas party?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Sister Luce.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Sister Luce.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Sister Luce.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We couldn't celebrate it last year due to the sacred mission.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We couldn't celebrate it last year due to the sacred mission.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We couldn't celebrate it last year due to the sacred mission.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But this year, I was thinking of inviting everyone we're thankful for and spending Christmas altogether.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But this year, I was thinking of inviting everyone we're thankful for and spending Christmas altogether.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But this year, I was thinking of inviting everyone we're thankful for and spending Christmas altogether.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Also, it just so happens that Christmas is when Sister Looper returns from her priest evaluation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Also, it just so happens that Christmas is when Sister Looper returns from her priest evaluation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Also, it just so happens that Christmas is when Sister Looper returns from her priest evaluation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...How coincidental.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...How coincidental.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...How coincidental.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I-is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I-is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I-is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: R-right! So, how about we celebrate Sister Looper's ordination on Christmas too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: R-right! So, how about we celebrate Sister Looper's ordination on Christmas too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: R-right! So, how about we celebrate Sister Looper's ordination on Christmas too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that seems a bit strange.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that seems a bit strange.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that seems a bit strange.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no guarantee that Sister Looper will pass.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no guarantee that Sister Looper will pass.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no guarantee that Sister Looper will pass.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
U-um... B-but still
8g

U-um... B-but still
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I guess there's no fooling Sister Luce.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I guess there's no fooling Sister Luce.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I guess there's no fooling Sister Luce.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In truth, I wanted to create a special memory for Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In truth, I wanted to create a special memory for Sister Looper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In truth, I wanted to create a special memory for Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A special memory?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A special memory?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A special memory?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Because she has never properly celebrated Christmas before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Because she has never properly celebrated Christmas before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Because she has never properly celebrated Christmas before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...When I arrived at the CSE Level 3 Corrupted Area for my sacred mission, she was all alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...When I arrived at the CSE Level 3 Corrupted Area for my sacred mission, she was all alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...When I arrived at the CSE Level 3 Corrupted Area for my sacred mission, she was all alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I saw her watching a horror movie by herself in the cultist's basement as if she was possessed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I saw her watching a horror movie by herself in the cultist's basement as if she was possessed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I saw her watching a horror movie by herself in the cultist's basement as if she was possessed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She was covered in blood, surrounded by scattered C.O. corpses...
root.m_Talk_DEU: She was covered in blood, surrounded by scattered C.O. corpses...
root.m_Talk_FRA: She was covered in blood, surrounded by scattered C.O. corpses...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The cult that imprisoned her committed human rights violations under the guise of an orphanage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The cult that imprisoned her committed human rights violations under the guise of an orphanage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The cult that imprisoned her committed human rights violations under the guise of an orphanage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sacred mission report stated that she had delirium due to CSE, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sacred mission report stated that she had delirium due to CSE, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sacred mission report stated that she had delirium due to CSE, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: When Sister Looper had her mental health examined after being rescued, the results showed no abnormalities.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When Sister Looper had her mental health examined after being rescued, the results showed no abnormalities.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When Sister Looper had her mental health examined after being rescued, the results showed no abnormalities.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, the human rights violations committed by the cult cannot necessarily be blamed on CSE.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, the human rights violations committed by the cult cannot necessarily be blamed on CSE.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, the human rights violations committed by the cult cannot necessarily be blamed on CSE.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rather, there is research that shows that the subconscious emotional change in humans can affect the Counterside Effect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rather, there is research that shows that the subconscious emotional change in humans can affect the Counterside Effect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rather, there is research that shows that the subconscious emotional change in humans can affect the Counterside Effect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. But then, that means...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. But then, that means...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. But then, that means...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper has spent years there without going insane.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper has spent years there without going insane.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper has spent years there without going insane.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how tough she acts, she is still just a child... That poor thing...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how tough she acts, she is still just a child... That poor thing...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how tough she acts, she is still just a child... That poor thing...

root.m_Talk_ENG: They say people live by memories, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: They say people live by memories, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: They say people live by memories, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... would it be possible for you to generously forgive Sister Looper?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... would it be possible for you to generously forgive Sister Looper?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... would it be possible for you to generously forgive Sister Looper?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This year, I want to give her a <color=#ffd34c>special Christmas</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This year, I want to give her a <color=#ffd34c>special Christmas</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This year, I want to give her a <color=#ffd34c>special Christmas</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A happy memory that she will cherish well into her adulthood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A happy memory that she will cherish well into her adulthood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A happy memory that she will cherish well into her adulthood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson. Personal and professional matters must be kept strictly separate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson. Personal and professional matters must be kept strictly separate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Nelson. Personal and professional matters must be kept strictly separate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I do not let my emotions get involved in the responsibilities our Lord has given me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I do not let my emotions get involved in the responsibilities our Lord has given me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I do not let my emotions get involved in the responsibilities our Lord has given me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What you're saying is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What you're saying is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What you're saying is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the Lord has also said that happiness is multiplied when shared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the Lord has also said that happiness is multiplied when shared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the Lord has also said that happiness is multiplied when shared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, a small banquet with everyone we owe a debt of gratitude does not sound like a bad idea.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, a small banquet with everyone we owe a debt of gratitude does not sound like a bad idea.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It is important to maintain proper respect in professional relations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Luce...!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Luce...!

root.m_Talk_DEU: However, do not tell Sister Looper about this until Christmas Day.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Her priest evaluation is in a few days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She has just started to put in effort, and I worry that she will get too excited and neglect her duties.

root.m_Talk_FRA: She has just started to put in effort, and I worry that she will get too excited and neglect her duties.

root.m_Talk_FRA: O-of course! I'll keep it a secret from Sister Looper!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah, it seems that this will be a surprise party for Sister Looper.

root.m_Talk_FRA: To be honest, I didn't expect you to allow it this easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ahem.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I do not. Sister Looper is irrational, violent, and ignorant.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All I can hope for as her senior is that she matures quickly with each passing day.

root.m_Talk_FRA: All I can hope for as her senior is that she matures quickly with each passing day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. This too must be a blessing from the merciful Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, leave everything to me... from choosing the party location, inviting our guests, and preparing the food.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, leave everything to me... from choosing the party location, inviting our guests, and preparing the food.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, leave everything to me... from choosing the party location, inviting our guests, and preparing the food.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do my best so everyone can have a happy Christmas...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do my best so everyone can have a happy Christmas...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do my best so everyone can have a happy Christmas...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I look forward to the party, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I look forward to the party, Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I look forward to the party, Sister Nelson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on, preparing food...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on, preparing food...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on, preparing food...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you actually followed them. What did you see within the village?

root.m_Talk_FRA: There wasn't much, to be honest.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Some were singing and dancing. Others were drawing something in dirt. And one was preparing food in the corner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But up close?

root.m_Talk_ENG: that the intuition that she had as an Inquisitorial Priest was not unfounded...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I apologize for keeping you waiting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I apologize for keeping you waiting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I apologize for keeping you waiting.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It has been a while, Sister Nelson. How have you been faring?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good. How have you been, Mr. Ferrier?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good. How have you been, Mr. Ferrier?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good. How have you been, Mr. Ferrier?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you can just call me Ryan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you can just call me Ryan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you can just call me Ryan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But what brings a Sister from the Investigation Council to the Institution...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But what brings a Sister from the Investigation Council to the Institution...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But what brings a Sister from the Investigation Council to the Institution...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, nothing much... I'm here to deliver this to the Chief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, nothing much... I'm here to deliver this to the Chief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, nothing much... I'm here to deliver this to the Chief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is... an invitation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is... an invitation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is... an invitation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. This Christmas, the Investigation Council is holding a small Christmas party.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. This Christmas, the Investigation Council is holding a small Christmas party.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. This Christmas, the Investigation Council is holding a small Christmas party.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard that Sir Burnett of the Institution and Cardinal Johan had long been close friends.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that Sir Burnett of the Institution and Cardinal Johan had long been close friends.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that Sir Burnett of the Institution and Cardinal Johan had long been close friends.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, I thought that if we were to host a Christmas party, this first thing I should do is make a visit to the Institution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, I thought that if we were to host a Christmas party, this first thing I should do is make a visit to the Institution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, I thought that if we were to host a Christmas party, this first thing I should do is make a visit to the Institution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, this is an honor.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, this is an honor.

Lady Elizabeth has run away from ho

root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, a good relationship cannot be cherished without fragrant black tea and sweet desserts.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a scone, a popular English dessert. It goes best with tea.

root.m_Talk_DEU: It's so crispy! It really does go great with tea! And the fruit jam served with it is delightful!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's so crispy! It really does go great with tea! And the fruit jam served with it is delightful!

root.m_Talk_DEU: You have outdone yourself! I didn't know you could bake such delicious bread!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have outdone yourself! I didn't know you could bake such delicious bread!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you have great insight. A well baked, then cooled scone is crispy and delicious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you have great insight. A well baked, then cooled scone is crispy and delicious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you have great insight. A well baked, then cooled scone is crispy and delicious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I prefer not to add eggs because it brings out the dry texture of the dough.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I prefer not to add eggs because it brings out the dry texture of the dough.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I prefer not to add eggs because it brings out the dry texture of the dough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ryan, how did you get your hands on such a recipe?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ryan, how did you get your hands on such a recipe?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ryan, how did you get your hands on such a recipe?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, Lady Elizabeth is a rather picky eater, so you can say these are the results of my constant efforts to satisfy her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, Lady Elizabeth is a rather picky eater, so you can say these are the results of my constant efforts to satisfy her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, Lady Elizabeth is a rather picky eater, so you can say these are the results of my constant efforts to satisfy her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have certifications for Western, Chinese, and Japanese cuisine, as well as master-level patisserie and chocolatier qualifications...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have certifications for Western, Chinese, and Japanese cuisine, as well as master-level patisserie and chocolatier qualifications...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have certifications for Western, Chinese, and Japanese cuisine, as well as master-level patisserie and chocolatier qualifications...

root.m_Talk_ENG: All to ensure that I can serve Lady Elizabeth the finest dishes anytime, anywhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All to ensure that I can serve Lady Elizabeth the finest dishes anytime, anywhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All to ensure that I can serve Lady Elizabeth the finest dishes anytime, anywhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I admire your passion. You see, I also like to cook.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I admire your passion. You see, I also like to cook.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I admire your passion. You see, I also like to cook.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although I'm not as great as you, Ryan...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although I'm not as great as you, Ryan...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although I'm not as great as you, Ryan...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you flatter me. Now, I'm curious to taste your cooking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you flatter me. Now, I'm curious to taste your cooking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you flatter me. Now, I'm curious to taste your cooking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, since you mentioned it, Ryan...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, since you mentioned it, Ryan...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, since you mentioned it, Ryan...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know it's rude to suddenly ask for a favor, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know it's rude to suddenly ask for a favor, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know it's rude to suddenly ask for a favor, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have been pondering what dishes I should serve at the Christmas party.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have been pondering what dishes I should serve at the Christmas party.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have been pondering what dishes I should serve at the Christmas party.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know any dishes that are suitable for one?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know any dishes that are suitable for one?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know any dishes that are suitable for one?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... A Christmas party, you say...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... A Christmas party, you say...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... A Christmas party, you say...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe a sweet dessert will be a good choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe a sweet dessert will be a good choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe a sweet dessert will be a good choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A dessert...? Well, this is embarrassing to admit, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A dessert...? Well, this is embarrassing to admit, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A dessert...? Well, this is embarrassing to admit, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never made desserts before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never made desserts before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never made desserts before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it is okay with you, Sister, would you like to learn a recipe from me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it is okay with you, Sister, would you like to learn a recipe from me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it is okay with you, Sister, would you like to learn a recipe from me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? A recipe?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? A recipe?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? A recipe?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. There is a treasured recipe that has been passed down to the Ferrier family for generations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. There is a treasured recipe that has been passed down to the Ferrier family for generations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. There is a treasured recipe that has been passed down to the Ferrier family for generations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is... a special, sweet dessert that you would share with your friends and family on a white Christmas night,

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...gathered around the fireplace as soft snowflakes fall outside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, it will still be delicious regardless if it snows or not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, it will still be delicious regardless if it snows or not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, it will still be delicious regardless if it snows or not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this is it...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this is it...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this is it...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was looking for a dish that became even more delicious when shared with others!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was looking for a dish that became even more delicious when shared with others!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was looking for a dish that became even more delicious when shared with others!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, maybe it was the Lord's will that I came here and met you, Ryan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, maybe it was the Lord's will that I came here and met you, Ryan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, maybe it was the Lord's will that I came here and met you, Ryan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I am glad that I was of help to you, Sister.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I am glad that I was of help to you, Sister.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I am glad that I was of help to you, Sister.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... what kind of dessert is it that suits a white Christmas?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... what kind of dessert is it that suits a white Christmas?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... what kind of dessert is it that suits a white Christmas?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's called...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's called...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's called...

root.m_Talk_ENG: a <color=#ffd34c>chocolate mousse cake</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: a <color=#ffd34c>chocolate mousse cake</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: a <color=#ffd34c>chocolate mousse cake</color>.
